calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-06-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Appearances: Susan Leann Baker, petitioner in pro per,is sworn and examined. The Court grants the petition for change of name to Susan Leann Baker Manning. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: R.Goulding; Reporter B Yee CSR# 2647
